title: Moving (bcSunday)
synopsis:
When her parents split and her father Kenichi moves out of their family home, Renko, a bright and energetic 6th grade girl, is left alone with her mother, Nazuna, in Kyoto. As Nazuna sets out new rules for their life together, Renko makes plans of her own, and sees to it that any changes happening in her family happen on her terms.

 

Since its premiere at Cannes in Un Certain Regard in 1993, Moving has been Shinji Somai’s most beloved films. In this poignant family drama, Somai transcends the tropes of stories of children dealing with divorce to bring us a film filled with indelible images about an unforgettable teenage girl who encounters the unknown and refuses to succumb to it.

synopsis_lang.en:
When her parents split and her father Kenichi moves out of their family home, Renko, a bright and energetic 6th grade girl, is left alone with her mother, Nazuna, in Kyoto. As Nazuna sets out new rules for their life together, Renko makes plans of her own, and sees to it that any changes happening in her family happen on her terms.

 

Since its premiere at Cannes in Un Certain Regard in 1993, Moving has been Shinji Somai’s most beloved films. In this poignant family drama, Somai transcends the tropes of stories of children dealing with divorce to bring us a film filled with indelible images about an unforgettable teenage girl who encounters the unknown and refuses to succumb to it.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 「為什麼要生我？」小學六年級的蓮，面對爸媽無止盡的爭吵和分居的決定，忍不住喊出疑問。爸爸突然搬家了，媽媽自把自為要和她約法三章，同學以為沒有幸福家庭的人都是怪胎，本是最天真無憂的歲月忽然瓦解。蓮暗中安排一家去琵琶湖度假，想拯救父母支離破碎的關係，祭典的熱鬧卻無法治癒她的寂寞。當焰火燒盡，她穿過了魔幻的森林，在湖裡等待她的是什麼？

cast: Kiichi Nakai, Junko Sakurada, Tomoko Tabata

cast_lang.en: Kiichi Nakai, Junko Sakurada, Tomoko Tabata
cast_lang.zh_hk: 中井貴一、櫻田淳子、田畑智子

subtitle: Chinese,English
